screenshot_diff.method: side-by-side fixed reference PNG versus MVP screenshot review

checks: mobile app bar height and destructive action placement
summary header tile, badge, and typography
recipe card border, radius, spacing, and CTA hierarchy

classified_followups: Shared bottom-tab pantry icon shape remains inherited from the already-merged Wave1 mobile navigation component and is outside this RECIPEBOOK_DETAIL branch.
Recipebook API exposes tag strings but not dedicated view-count, minutes, or servings fields, so production metadata remains contract-derived while visual evidence uses representative tag strings.
